presses.notes: Mobile Eats has package and flywheel substrate evidence, but no v0.1 release receipt, SkillOS hardening receipt, or signed-equity receipt. PRESS readiness remains blocked.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical PRESS readiness gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.

PRESS clear requires candidate fit, v0.1 release proof, SkillOS hardening, flywheel coordination, package delivery, Yuzu owner-operator voice, signed equity, owner economics, and substrate-share receipts.
This gate ties the PRESS loop together; adjacent ledgers still own their detailed validation.
next_action: Attach v0.1 release, SkillOS hardening, signed-equity, and owner-economics receipts before marking any candidate press_clear or formation_ready.
